title: nicotiana australis
intro: Nicotiana australis, also known as the Darling Island flowering tobacco or Tasmanian flowering tobacco, is a plant species native to Australia that belongs to the nightshade family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. Its health benefits include reducing stress and anxiety, alleviating respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, and acting as a natural expectorant to relieve congestion. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and smoking mixtures, but caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity.
